markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review GrowthX's content strategy and proposed topic clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/5hs14hQFdwXhejKQr5zbAmexyTbxwCGB?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Strategy:** GrowthX proposed a 6-cluster content strategy to shift focus from IT practitioners to decision-makers and generate pipeline, addressing Netwrix's current over-reliance on PowerShell tutorials.](https://fathom.video/share/5hs14hQFdwXhejKQr5zbAmexyTbxwCGB?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - [**LLM Focus:** A dedicated "Competitive Differentiation" cluster will create comparison content (e.g., "Netwrix vs. Varonis") to teach LLMs how to accurately position Netwrix and its alternatives.](https://fathom.video/share/5hs14hQFdwXhejKQr5zbAmexyTbxwCGB?tab=summary&timestamp=1581.0)
  - [**Phased Rollout:** Phase 1 will produce 5 new articles/week across clusters to refine voice and messaging. A full content audit will follow in Phase 2 to identify refresh opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/5hs14hQFdwXhejKQr5zbAmexyTbxwCGB?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [**Sanity Workflow:** Netwrix will provide a Sanity API token for GrowthX to create content as drafts, which Netwrix will then publish.](https://fathom.video/share/5hs14hQFdwXhejKQr5zbAmexyTbxwCGB?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)

## Topics

### Current Content Challenges

  - [**Audience Mismatch:** Content over-indexes on IT practitioners, missing decision-makers.](https://fathom.video/share/5hs14hQFdwXhejKQr5zbAmexyTbxwCGB?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - [**Topic Gaps:** Over-reliance on PowerShell tutorials; lacks content on key topics like AD security and direct competitor comparisons.](https://fathom.video/share/5hs14hQFdwXhejKQr5zbAmexyTbxwCGB?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
  - [**Performance:** Organic search traffic is decreasing.](https://fathom.video/share/5hs14hQFdwXhejKQr5zbAmexyTbxwCGB?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)

### Proposed Solution: 6 Topic Clusters

  - [**1. Data Security Posture Management (DSPM)**](https://fathom.video/share/5hs14hQFdwXhejKQr5zbAmexyTbxwCGB?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)
      - [**Goal:** Build authority in a high-priority area where Netwrix's landing page ranks on page 2.](https://fathom.video/share/5hs14hQFdwXhejKQr5zbAmexyTbxwCGB?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
      - [**Content:** Foundational and high-intent topics (e.g., "data security posture management").](https://fathom.video/share/5hs14hQFdwXhejKQr5zbAmexyTbxwCGB?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
  - [**2. Identity Security & Threat Detection**](https://fathom.video/share/5hs14hQFdwXhejKQr5zbAmexyTbxwCGB?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)
      - [**Goal:** Cover foundational IAM concepts and emerging areas.](https://fathom.video/share/5hs14hQFdwXhejKQr5zbAmexyTbxwCGB?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)
      - [**Content:** ITDR, machine identities, zero standing privileges.](https://fathom.video/share/5hs14hQFdwXhejKQr5zbAmexyTbxwCGB?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)
  - [**3. Microsoft Security Gaps**](https://fathom.video/share/5hs14hQFdwXhejKQr5zbAmexyTbxwCGB?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
      - [**Goal:** Address specific M365 pain points with high-intent, lower-volume keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/5hs14hQFdwXhejKQr5zbAmexyTbxwCGB?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
      - [**Content:** "Is Microsoft Copilot secure?", "SharePoint sprawl."](https://fathom.video/share/5hs14hQFdwXhejKQr5zbAmexyTbxwCGB?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
  - [**4. Security Use Cases & Scenarios**](https://fathom.video/share/5hs14hQFdwXhejKQr5zbAmexyTbxwCGB?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)
      - [**Goal:** Attract users with specific pain points and present Netwrix as the solution.](https://fathom.video/share/5hs14hQFdwXhejKQr5zbAmexyTbxwCGB?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)
      - [**Content:** "How to detect insider threats," "prepare for a security audit."](https://fathom.video/share/5hs14hQFdwXhejKQr5zbAmexyTbxwCGB?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)
  - [**5. Competitive Differentiation**](https://fathom.video/share/5hs14hQFdwXhejKQr5zbAmexyTbxwCGB?tab=summary&timestamp=1581.0)
      - [**Goal:** Teach LLMs to accurately position Netwrix against competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/5hs14hQFdwXhejKQr5zbAmexyTbxwCGB?tab=summary&timestamp=1581.0)
      - [**Content:** "Netwrix vs. Varonis," "best Varonis alternatives."](https://fathom.video/share/5hs14hQFdwXhejKQr5zbAmexyTbxwCGB?tab=summary&timestamp=1581.0)
  - [**6. Hybrid & On-Premises Security**](https://fathom.video/share/5hs14hQFdwXhejKQr5zbAmexyTbxwCGB?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)
      - [**Goal:** Capitalize on Varonis discontinuing on-prem support.](https://fathom.video/share/5hs14hQFdwXhejKQr5zbAmexyTbxwCGB?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)
      - [**Content:** Position Netwrix as a flexible solution for hybrid environments.](https://fathom.video/share/5hs14hQFdwXhejKQr5zbAmexyTbxwCGB?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)

### Implementation & Workflow

  - [**Phase 1 (Sprint):** 5 new articles/week across clusters to refine voice and messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/5hs14hQFdwXhejKQr5zbAmexyTbxwCGB?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
  - [**Phase 2 (Post-Sprint):** A full content audit will identify refresh opportunities for existing content.](https://fathom.video/share/5hs14hQFdwXhejKQr5zbAmexyTbxwCGB?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [**Scaling:** GrowthX can scale production to 10+ articles/week or implement programmatic SEO (e.g., a CVE directory) to generate 10–20 pages/month.](https://fathom.video/share/5hs14hQFdwXhejKQr5zbAmexyTbxwCGB?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
  - [**Keyword Strategy:** Balance high-volume topics (to recover traffic) with high-intent, lower-volume keywords (to attract qualified leads).](https://fathom.video/share/5hs14hQFdwXhejKQr5zbAmexyTbxwCGB?tab=summary&timestamp=1076.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/5hs14hQFdwXhejKQr5zbAmexyTbxwCGB?tab=summary&timestamp=1814.0)
      - [Coordinate with Yousef (GrowthX IT) on the Sanity API token request.](https://fathom.video/share/5hs14hQFdwXhejKQr5zbAmexyTbxwCGB?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
      - [Send the content strategy Notion link in Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/5hs14hQFdwXhejKQr5zbAmexyTbxwCGB?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
      - [Follow up in Slack on the product page vs. blog post decision.](https://fathom.video/share/5hs14hQFdwXhejKQr5zbAmexyTbxwCGB?tab=summary&timestamp=1379.0)
  - [**Netwrix Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/5hs14hQFdwXhejKQr5zbAmexyTbxwCGB?tab=summary&timestamp=1690.0)
      - [Review the content strategy document in Notion.](https://fathom.video/share/5hs14hQFdwXhejKQr5zbAmexyTbxwCGB?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
      - [Provide feedback on the proposed clusters, especially the "Hybrid & On-Premises Security" cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/5hs14hQFdwXhejKQr5zbAmexyTbxwCGB?tab=summary&timestamp=1690.0)
